productDisplayName: W Women Gathered Design Green Kurti
description: Composition Green square-neck kurti made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with piping, half buttoned placket, pin tucks at the neck that flare out at the waist, gathered design and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Hot iron This kurta by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this classic piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look. You can also wear it with denims and matching ballerina shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8", chest 33" and waist 26"
